data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'real-time itinerary updates', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or operational. While there are mentions of itinerary updates in the use case summary, there is no concrete API evidence or persisted state checks that demonstrate the real-time aspect of these updates. This leads to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of real-time itinerary updates functionality or API endpoints that support this requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
